sessions.intent: Validate test quality for the builder-ergonomics branch (channel recursion guard, P4 error chaining, builder-channel routing, P6 confidence reproduction).

before.assumptions: No coder/ folder; work driven from user-feedback.md + tester-handoff.md. No baseline-tests.md (process gap). Mostly PLang builder goals + 6 C# files.
before.risk: New .test.goal (UnknownVerb) flagged in handoff as asserting nothing; channel guard is the load-bearing change.

actions.context: Clean rebuild (stale-binary protocol). Ran C# suite (3376/3377) and plang suite (233/234). Isolated both failures.

Committed .pr mis-compiled compress->variable.set; no assertions; confidence null on all steps. Two clean rebuilds hard-failed (ValidationErrors / BuilderPlannerFailed) — documented confidence warnings do not reproduce. CRITICAL false-green.
PropertyLookupCache test asserts on a static ConcurrentDictionary count under parallel TUnit; passes isolated, fails in suite. MAJOR flaky/shared-static finding.

Mutation test: deleted InvokeGoal's `_executing.Value = true`; all 7 channel tests still green. Guard arming untested end-to-end (tests flip AsyncLocal via reflection). Source reverted, git clean. MAJOR missing-coverage.

after.notes: 5 findings (1 critical false-green, 2 major, 2 minor). Full detail in tester/v1/result.md and test-report.json. Source untouched (mutation reverted).

sessions.intent: Re-test coder v2 fixes to v1 FAIL findings (F1 delete false-green, F2 cache test, F3 channel-guard end-to-end test).

before.assumptions: Coder v2 (b86539c99) claims all three actionable findings fixed and suites green. Must independently verify F3's mutation rather than trust the report.
before.risk: F3 is the load-bearing change; need to re-run the mutation and confirm the new test catches guard removal with the right error key.

actions.context: Clean rebuild. C# 3377/3377 (F2 flake gone), PLang 234/234 (no fail, no timeout this run).
F2: per-key ReferenceEquals assertion replaces global CacheSize count; ClearCacheForTests/CacheSize removed. Pins caching, no parallel race.

F3: .pr action matches step text (no builder false-green). Independent mutation: deleting _executing.Value=true -> recursion test fails Expected 'ChannelNotFound' / Actual 'CallStackOverflow'. Reverted, git clean, re-ran green. Guard now covered end-to-end.

after.notes: All 3 actionable v1 findings resolved + independently verified. F4/F5 deferred (environmental/hygiene). Detail in tester/v2/result.md. Source untouched (mutation reverted).

sessions.intent: Security review of builder-ergonomics — channel recursion guard, foundational-snapshot removal, error chaining, Tagged cleanup.

before.assumptions: Tester v2 PASS. Net delta vs runtime2: per-channel IsExecuting AsyncLocal replaces FreezeFoundational/PushChannelsOverride/Snapshot; deletions on Tagged.ClearCacheForTests; error chaining in Conversion; builder LLM/goal pipeline updates.
before.risk: AsyncLocal flow vs Task.Run, registry-Channel(name) bypass of IsExecuting guard, removed test-only APIs, error-chain potentially exposing original value.

actions.context: Recursion guard via AsyncLocal<bool> _executing on channel.goal.@this; Channels.Get returns null when goal-channel is executing. Cycles A→B→A surface ChannelNotFound. AsyncLocal correctly flows into RunGoalAsync; finally restores prev. Task.Run copy-on-write preserves true value for spawned children. Sound.

Channels.Channel(name) opportunistic API bypasses the IsExecuting guard (raw _channels.TryGetValue). Today only file/read.cs uses it for the builder warning sink and BuilderChannel.goal body does not loop. Latent: any future caller writing to its own goal-channel name via Channel() recurses past the guard until the CallStack backstop. Flagged Low.

FreezeFoundational/FoundationalChannels/PushChannelsOverride/Snapshot removed; no live callers remain (grep clean across PLang, PlangConsole, PLang.Tests source; only stale generated metadata under obj/). Surface shrinks.

Error chaining: when conversion fails on an inbound errors.Error, the new convErr is appended to sourceErr.ErrorChain and sourceErr is returned. Exception=ex captured. Error message embeds value.ToString() (pre-existing behavior). No new sensitive-data egress; ErrorChain mutation is on the inbound Error, no shared accumulator concurrency.
Removed internal test-only ClearCacheForTests / CacheSize. No production-callable behavior changed. Unbounded _cache pre-existing; not a regression.
Regression test arms IsExecuting and asserts ChannelNotFound specifically; tester v2 independently re-ran mutation (delete _executing.Value=true → CallStackOverflow). Coverage genuine.
scripts/semgrep-scan.sh: 15 findings, all on baseline serializer-hygiene list. No new architectural-rule violations from this branch.

after.health: No critical/high findings open. One Low: Channels.Channel(name) bypasses IsExecuting guard — latent recursion hole.
after.notes: Net change is a security improvement: AsyncLocal channel-override layer + Snapshot path deleted; recursion guard is local to the resolving party and per-channel.

sessions.intent: Close documentation gaps from the IsExecuting-replaces-FoundationalChannels refactor and the builder confidence/channel-routing additions.

before.assumptions: Auditor PASS, security PASS, tester v2 PASS. Stale FoundationalChannels references in io-channels.md / app-tree.md / check-app-tree.sh. No claude-md or character proposals on branch.
before.risk: A reader following io-channels.md today lands on deleted APIs (FoundationalChannels / PushChannelsOverride). Highest-impact gap on the branch.

actions.context: Rewrote three sections referencing deleted FoundationalChannels / PushChannelsOverride / FreezeFoundational. Channel.Goal.@this paragraph now describes the AsyncLocal _executing guard with the registry Get() branch quoted from PLang/app/channels/this.cs. Actor-resolution block collapsed to the direct registry. Replace-output example rewritten as a sibling fan-out (the old example would fail under IsExecuting).
Dropped FreezeFoundational from the actor tree and the matching skip regex from the canary script.

Added 'Confidence per step' section (level table, warning shape, trace file paths) and 'Builder output routing' section (BuilderChannel.goal / EmitBuildEvent.goal / templates/output/build-output.template architecture, redirection seam, EmitSummary gate-removal note).

Appended 'Recursion guards belong on the value, not on a parallel context layer'. Worked example (channels migration), failure mode of the deleted shape (foundational-snapshot bug), tells for drifting back, when overlay shape IS the right answer (different-values vs hide-the-caller).
Docs v1 bookkeeping — plan, verdict, summary, structured report.

after.notes: Five documentation gaps closed (3 stale-doc, 2 missing-doc). No PLang examples needed, no XML doc gaps detected, no claude-md or character proposals on branch. Branch ready to merge per docs gate.
